case_title: ZABALA, ANIDIA VS LOPEZ, JUAN JORGE AKA LOPEZ-SALAZAR, JUAN JORGE et al

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO HILARY RONIN C/O LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL:474 VALENCIA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT RONIN, HILARY C/O CENTRO LEGAL

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,906.25 FILED BY LOPEZ, JUAN JORGE AKA LOPEZ-SALAZAR, JUAN JORGE RONIN, HILARY C/O CENTRO LEGAL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ZABALA, ANIDIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-2007 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO DEFT LOPEZ, JUAN RETURNED UNDELIVERED. NO SUCH NUMBER.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF ZABALA, ANIDIA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-05-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-14-2007 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.
NOTICE AND TIME OF HEARING SENT TO DEFENDANT RETUR NED UNABLE TO FORWARD.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO DEFT LOPEZ, JUAN.
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED
POS/DUCES TECUM FILED.
PLTFF'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED;PAID $10 FEE; TO FOLDER/TRAY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LOPEZ, JUAN JORGE AKA LOPEZ-SALAZAR, JUAN JORGE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT ZABALA, ANIDIA $350.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $350.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY ZABALA, ANIDIA AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JUAN JORGE AKA LOPEZ-SALAZAR, JUAN JORGE RONIN, HILARY C/O CENTRO LEGAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2007 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RONIN, HILARY C/O CENTRO LEGAL
AMENDED DECLARATION FOR CAUSES OF ACTION FILED BY ANIDIA ZABALA.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-08-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-05-2007 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF TO SERVE AMENDED CLAIM ON DEFENDANTS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZABALA, ANIDIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JUAN JORGE AKA LOPEZ-SALAZAR, JUAN JORGE PLAINTIFF HILARY RONIN DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF ZABALA, ANIDIA
